Current Opportunities

Senior Officer, Individual Philanthropy and Planned Gifts

St. Boniface Hospital also welcomes volunteers in many areas. Learn more.

St. Boniface Hospital Foundation is committed to the principle of equity in employment. We welcome diversity and encourage all qualified applicants, including persons with disabilities, members of visible minorities, and Indigenous people.
